docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, YING TING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,050.00, JUDGMENT REPRESENTS THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S 2017 LEXUS ES-300H SEDAN OM MARCH 18, 2025. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT MISLED PLAINTIFF TO MANIPULATE HER TO SIGN TOWING AGREEMENT, FAILED TO PROVIDE HER A TIMELY REPAIR ESTIMATE, AND REFUSED TO RELEASE VEHICLE TO HER UPON HER REQUEST. DEFENDANT HAD NO LEGAL GROUNDS TO DEMAND PAYMENT OF "STORAGE FEES" PRIOR TO RELEASING PLAINTIFFS VEHICLE TO HER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING TING AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-2025 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-11-2025 SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00(WAIVED) AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2025 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JAN-15-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO EXAMINATION HELD. JUDGMENT CREDITOR LI YING TING APPEARED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY APPEARED. DEFENDANT TO FILE A MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO JAN-15-2026 AT 11:00AM BY STIPULATION
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED (EJ-100 FILED ON OCTOBER 24, 2025 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMNET.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY LI, YING TING AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING TING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED APR-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EUR-ASIA AUTO BODY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LI YING TING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EUR-ASIAN AUTO BODY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
